title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 is a major annual conference held June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. The event features keynote sessions and main-stage programming across multiple time blocks, streamed online for broader audience reach.
writeup: This video streams Day 1 of the AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, the annual conference held June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. Coverage centers on keynote sessions and main-stage programming organized across multiple time blocks, with the stream extending the event to an online audience. The takeaway is access to the day's headline talks for those not attending in person.
